name: io.github.vamsisudhakaran1/release-gate
description: Pre-deploy security auditor for AI agent code. Finds the agent-layer risks generic SAST misses (model output reaching eval/exec/pickle, prompt-injection surfaces, uncapped LLM calls, hardcoded secrets), with confidence + confirmed/inferred basis. Read-only, local-only, never executes scanned code.

environmentVariables.name: RG_MCP_ALLOWED_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Colon/semicolon-separated directories the server may read under. Defaults to the working directory. The server refuses any path outside these roots (blocks ../, absolute, and symlink escapes).
